utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all five keys. Now check if each is fully specified with details and costs: 1) health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance and a combined cost (€165/month). It names plans and costs; satisfies 'physical and mental health insurance with costs.' 2) property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance with a named coverage and cost (€60/month); meets requirement. 3) travel_coverage: specifies travel insurance focused on adventure activities with cost (€50/month); meets requirement. 4) additional_services: includes a description but no costs; the format requires 'any enhancement services with costs.' This lacks a cost, so not fully specified. 5) total_budget: includes a monthly total (€275/month); meets requirement. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes specific items: InsurePlus Standard Plan for physical health (primary_health_coverage.physical_health), InsurePlus Standard Plan for mental health (primary_health_coverage.mental_health), InsurePlus Standard Coverage for home contents (property_protection.home_content), and InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel insurance (mobility_coverage.travel_insurance). Using the ground-truth, their ratings are 10, 7, 10, and 10 respectively.
